---
applyTo: "README.md,source/**/*.rst,source/**/*.md,misc/**/*.md"
---

When editing documentation in this repository:

- Write in clear English and keep tone concise and factual.
- Preserve existing Sphinx and MyST conventions, including cross-reference syntax and heading structure.
- Prefer updating current pages instead of creating duplicate pages with overlapping content.
- If commands are included, make them portable and avoid local absolute paths or machine-specific directory names.
- When changing setup or build instructions, keep them consistent with `pyproject.toml`, `uv.lock`, and the `Makefile`.
